description: Use this API to delete the specified machine’s capability curve from the working case. This API routine was first introduced in release 35.0.0. ierr = purgcapcurve(ibus, id)

parameters.name: ibus
parameters.description: Bus to which the specified machine is connected. (input; no default allowed).

parameters.name: id
parameters.description: Identifier of the machine whose capability curve is to be removed. (input; ‘1’ by default).

error_codes.description: capability curve not found for this machine.
prerequisite requirements for API are not met.
